items.label: Installation
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

Lightweight browser game engine powered by a CDN.

## Installation

### Script Tag
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

### ES Module
```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"
```

After loading:
```js
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: Initialization
items.content:
## init(options?)
Initializes engine, loads data, detects device, and applies initial state.

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: "all",
  search: "",
  sort: "name",
  src: "...",
  cdn: "..."
})
```

### Options
- mode: all | supported | favs
- search: string
- sort: string
- src: JSON URL
- cdn: thumbnail base URL

### Returns
```ts
Promise<ZYNQGames>
```

items.label: Game Model
items.content:
## Game

```ts
Game {
  name: string
  alias: string
  url: string
  thumb: string
  category?: string
  devices: number[]

  isSupported: boolean
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

items.label: State
items.content:
## Internal State

```ts
all: Game[]
filtered: Game[]
favorites: Set<string>
history: string[]
deviceType: number
```

items.label: View
items.content:
## Getters

### list
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
```
Returns:
```ts
Game[]
```

### total
```js
ZYNQ.games.total
```
Returns:
```ts
number
```

### filteredCount
```js
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount
```
Returns:
```ts
number
```

items.label: Core Methods
items.content:
## Core Methods

### search(query)
```js
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```
Returns:
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

### getByAlias(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("alien-hominid")
```
Returns:
```ts
Game | null
```

### getByCategory(category)
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("shooter")
```
Returns:
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

### reset()
```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```
Returns:
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: Favorites
items.content:
## Favorites

Stored in localStorage as ZYNQ_favs

### toggleFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("alien-hominid")
```
Returns:
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

### isFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("alien-hominid")
```
Returns:
```ts
boolean
```

items.label: History
items.content:
## History

Stored in localStorage as ZYNQ_history (max 50)

### addToHistory(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory("alien-hominid")
```
Returns:
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

### getHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```
Returns:
```ts
Game[]
```

### clearHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```
Returns:
```ts
ZYNQGames
```
